successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LeaveRequest, CreateLeaveRequestDto, UpdateLeaveRequestDto, and LeaveRequestQueryParams interfaces with exact attribute names matching canonical SQL definitions
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveRepository interface with create, findById, findByEmployeeId, findByQuery, updateStatus, update, and delete methods
src/modules/balance/balance.model.ts exists and exports LeaveBalance interface with exact attribute names matching canonical SQL definitions

src/modules/balance/balance.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveBalanceRepository interface with findByEmployeeId, findByEmployeeIdAndFiscalYear, findByEmployeeIdAndPolicyId, findByEmployeeIdPolicyIdAndFiscalYear, updateUsedDays, updateRemainingDays, and create methods
src/modules/policy/policy.model.ts exists and exports LeavePolicy interface with exact attribute names matching canonical SQL definitions
src/modules/policy/policy.repository.ts exists and exports ILeavePolicyRepository interface with findById, findAllActive, findByLeaveType, findByName, create, update, and deactivate methods

constraints: GP-001: Repository pattern - All database access goes through repository interfaces
All TypeScript interfaces must use exact attribute names from canonical SQL definitions
Dependency direction: leave -> employee, leave -> policy, leave -> balance, leave -> notification
outOfScope: Implementation of repository interfaces (deferred to Phase 5)
API controllers and routes (deferred to Phases 8-9)
Employee and Notification domain models (deferred to Phase 2)
Database schema creation (already defined in SQL)
Cross-cutting concerns like audit records, input validation, RBAC (deferred to later phases)
Actual database queries or PostgreSQL implementations
